investigation: VAE Enrichment Failure Root Cause Analysis
trigger: Gate G2 NO-GO (confirmed). Cohen's d = -0.04, EF@10 = 0 for all seeds/conditions.
root_cause: Total autoencoder failure: the SELFIES VAE decoder cannot generate aromatic ring systems, producing aliphatic fragments instead. Compounded by complete posterior collapse (zero active latent dimensions) rendering the encoder-decoder channel non-functional.

decoder_failure.description: The decoder cannot produce aromatic ring systems regardless of input

evidence.G1_reconstruction: 0% exact match, mean Tanimoto to input = 0.031. Cannot encode-decode ANY training molecule.
evidence.G3_greedy_decoding: Default molecule (z=0, argmax) is a 127-carbon aliphatic chain (CCCC...C). Identical for all 3 states.
evidence.G4_drug_seeding: Encoding real EGFR drugs then decoding at noise=0 gives max sim ~0.11 to input. Decoded molecules are aliphatic garbage.
evidence.C3_distributions: Generated aromatic rings = 0.03 (training = 3.56). Total rings = 1.54 (training = 4.42). MW = 367 (training = 480).
evidence.C2_scaffolds: Zero scaffold overlap between generated (170 scaffolds) and training (1168 scaffolds). Top generated scaffolds: cyclopropane (C1CC1), cyclopropene (C1=CC1).

latent_space_collapse.description: The latent space encodes no meaningful information despite non-zero aggregate KL

evidence.G7_active_dims: ZERO dimensions with KL > 0.01. All 64 dims have KL < 0.0013. Top dim KL = 0.0013.
evidence.G7_posterior_stats: mu_mean_norm = 0.162 (near origin), sigma_mean = 0.998 (= prior). Posterior ≈ Prior.
evidence.G7_state_separation: State centroid distances: 0.06-0.09. States completely overlap in latent space.
evidence.G8_cross_seed: Seed 42 KL=0.61, seed 123 KL=0.03, seed 7 KL=0.10 — all produce equally bad molecules (max future sim 0.13).
evidence.note: The aggregate KL of 0.61-0.68 for seed 42 APPEARED healthy in training logs, but is spread across 64 dimensions (~0.01 each), meaning no dimension carries information. This is posterior collapse disguised by dimensionality.

conditioning_cosmetic_only.description: State conditioning changes token sequences but not molecular quality

evidence.G5_conditioning: 0% identical outputs across states (conditioning does change tokens).
evidence.C7_per_state: All states produce mean future sim = 0.086, mean NN to training = 0.122. No quality difference.
evidence.G3_greedy: Greedy decoding from z=0 produces identical CCCC...C for all 3 states.

not_data_problem.description: Training data contains drug-relevant molecules; the representation is lossless

evidence.C1_training_proximity: Max training sim to afatinib = 1.0. 380/2000 training mols above 0.4 Tanimoto. Random training subsets achieve EF@10 = 1.32 (41/50 nonzero).
evidence.C4_selfies_roundtrip: All 7 EGFR drugs survive SMILES→SELFIES→SMILES with exact match and Tanimoto = 1.0.
evidence.C5_random_baseline: Random SELFIES even worse (max future sim = 0.063, validity 43%). VAE is marginally better than random but still terrible.

temperature_irrelevant.description: No temperature setting improves drug similarity

evidence.G2_temperature_sweep: T=0 through T=1.2: zero molecules above 0.3 Tanimoto to any drug at any temperature. T=0 produces a single repeated molecule. Best max sim across all T = 0.21 (at T=0.7).
evidence.G6_large_batch: 3000 molecules (1000/state), max future drug sim = 0.167. Zero above 0.3.

pmo_comparison_uninformative.description: PMO oracle comparison returned all zeros — GNINA docking timed out on CPU-only partition

evidence.pmo_comparison: budget=500, static 30 calls all score 0.0, state_aware 76 calls all score 0.0. Winner=tie. GNINA docking requires GPU but job ran on 'day' (CPU-only) partition. Both pipelines generated valid SMILES with proper scaffolds (gefitinib, erlotinib, afatinib analogues from baselines), but docking component returned 0 for all.
evidence.note: The PMO comparison is UNINFORMATIVE due to infrastructure issue, not a scientific finding. The docking scores are not real zeros — GNINA simply timed out. If PMO is re-run on a GPU partition with GNINA GPU mode, scores should be nonzero for the analogue-based candidates.

drugs_near_prior_but_still_garbage.description: Encoding real drugs places them near the prior, but decoding still fails — eliminating prior-posterior gap as a cause

evidence.G4_latent_norms: afatinib latent_norm=0.46, osimertinib=0.41, dacomitinib=0.43, mobocertinib=0.67, lazertinib=0.99, erlotinib=1.84, gefitinib=1.90. Four of 7 drugs encode to norm < 1.0 (within prior ball), yet decode to max self-similarity 0.08-0.11.
evidence.implication: Prior-posterior gap is NOT the failure mode. The drugs are already WHERE the prior samples from. The decoder simply cannot produce aromatic molecules from any latent code.

selfies_token_complexity.description: Drug molecules require 40-66 SELFIES tokens with multiple Ring1/Ring2 closures — long-range dependencies the GRU fails on

evidence.C4_token_counts: erlotinib=40 tokens, gefitinib=46, afatinib=53, osimertinib=66, dacomitinib=53, lazertinib=48, mobocertinib=62. Each contains multiple [Ring1]/[Ring2] tokens that reference earlier positions.
evidence.implication: Ring closure in SELFIES is a long-range dependency: the decoder must remember which atom to close a ring to, sometimes 20+ tokens back. The GRU's limited effective memory makes this nearly impossible to learn reliably.

likely_mechanism.step_1: During teacher-forced training, the decoder learns that [C] is the most frequent token and linear chains are the lowest-risk sequences to predict.
likely_mechanism.step_2: Aromatic ring closure in SELFIES requires producing [Ring1]/[Ring2] tokens that reference earlier positions — a long-range dependency the GRU decoder struggles with.
likely_mechanism.step_3: KL regularization pushes posteriors toward the prior. The decoder never learns to USE latent information, so the KL term drops as posteriors collapse. The model achieves 'reasonable' val_loss (2.235) by predicting common tokens without learning global molecular structure.
likely_mechanism.step_4: The result: the decoder maps every latent code to variations of aliphatic chains, ignoring both the encoded molecular identity and the state conditioning label.

H2_training_data_coverage.note: Training has max sim 1.0 to afatinib, EF@10=1.32 from random subsets

H4_temperature_too_high.note: No temperature helps; T=0 gives repeated aliphatic chain

H5_posterior_collapse.note: Zero active dimensions despite non-zero aggregate KL

H6_conditioning_no_effect.note: Conditioning changes tokens (G5) but not quality (C7, G3). Cosmetic effect only.

H7_prior_posterior_gap.note: G4 shows decoding from drug encodings gives same garbage as prior sampling. No gap — everything decodes to garbage.

H8_generic_not_egfr.note: Not even generic drug-like. Zero aromatic rings. Generated molecules are aliphatic fragments.

H9_prior_posterior_gap.note: G4 shows 4/7 drugs encode to latent_norm < 1.0 (within prior ball). Decoding from drug encodings at noise=0 gives max self-sim 0.08-0.11. No gap — everything decodes to garbage regardless of latent position.

implications.for_statebind: The SELFIES VAE component is non-functional. The retrospective enrichment (EF@10 = 4.95/7.72) comes entirely from analogue-based generation in baselines/, not from the VAE. The G2 NO-GO is not a subtle conditioning failure — it is a total autoencoder failure.
implications.for_thesis: The state-conditioning hypothesis cannot be tested with this VAE because the underlying generative model doesn't work. The concept of state-conditioned generation remains untested.
implications.for_publication: The VAE failure is actually informative: it demonstrates that SELFIES VAE (a common approach in the literature) fails catastrophically on EGFR drug generation despite high validity scores. This is a negative result worth documenting.
implications.for_pmo: PMO comparison was uninformative (GNINA timed out on CPU partition). If re-run on GPU, analogue-based candidates should score nonzero. The PMO infrastructure works; it's a deployment issue.
implications.for_latent_space: The posterior collapse is 'disguised' by aggregation: seed 42 shows KL=0.61 total, but this spreads over 64 dims at ~0.01 each. No individual dimension carries information. Future VAE work should monitor per-dimension KL, not just aggregate.

immediate: Accept VAE failure as conclusive. Do not attempt hyperparameter tuning — the failure is architectural/representational.
Focus the publication narrative on the scoring framework + retrospective validation + analogue-based enrichment.
Document the VAE failure as a methodological finding (validity ≠ utility for SELFIES VAE).
if_de_novo_generation_pursued: SMILES-based VAE (REINVENT-style RNN): SMILES encodes rings more naturally via branch/ring notation
Graph-based generation (MoLeR, GCPN): directly constructs molecular graphs, avoids serialization issues
Fragment-based generation (BRICS decomposition + assembly): guaranteed structural validity from fragments
Diffusion models (DiGress, EDM): recent state-of-art in molecular generation
recommended_next_steps.for_phase_2_planning: Reframe Phase 2 to focus on what DOES work (analogue-based generation with state-conditioned scoring) rather than what doesn't (VAE de novo generation).

key_numbers.review_conclusion: All findings from automated synthesis confirmed. Root cause diagnosis is conclusive: MODEL_FAILURE (decoder_incapacity + posterior_collapse). No corrections needed.
